channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Virginia man gets life in prison for double murder scheme in affair with au pair
item.description: A Virginia man who was having an affair with the family’s au pair has been sentenced to life in prison without parole for the murder of his wife and a man who was lured to the couple’s home as a fall guy.

item.title: National Park Service ranger dies after falling into a crevasse on Alaska’s Mount McKinley
What to know about new trials ordered for two paramedics in the death of Elijah McClain
